db:select.db:sql: SELECT request_no, customer_category, applicant_name, company_name, email, contact_method, phone, service_plan, additional_request_flag, additional_request_detail, notes, processing_status, priority_flag, created_at FROM service_request ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.rows map ((row) -> { requestNo: row.request_no, customerCategory: row.customer_category, applicantName: row.applicant_name, companyName: row.company_name, email: row.email, contactMethod: row.contact_method, phone: row.phone, servicePlan: row.service_plan, additionalRequestFlag: row.additional_request_flag, additionalRequestDetail: row.additional_request_detail, notes: row.notes, processingStatus: row.processing_status, priorityFlag: row.priority_flag, createdAt: row.created_at })

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java fun clean(value) = if (value == null) null else trim(value as String) var customerCategoryValue = clean(payload.customerCategory) var contactMethodValue = clean(payload.contactMethod) var hasAdditionalRequest = payload.additionalRequestFlag default false --- { customerCategory: customerCategoryValue, applicantName: clean(payload.applicantName), companyName: if (customerCategoryValue == "CORPORATE") clean(payload.companyName) else null, email: clean(payload.email), contactMethod: contactMethodValue, phone: if (contactMethodValue == "PHONE") clean(payload.phone) else null, servicePlan: clean(payload.servicePlan), additionalRequestFlag: hasAdditionalRequest, additionalRequestDetail: if (hasAdditionalRequest) clean(payload.additionalRequestDetail) else null, notes: clean(payload.notes) }

set-variable.value: #['REQ-' ++ ((now() >> 'Asia/Tokyo') as String {format: 'yyyyMMdd'}) ++ '-' ++ upper(((uuid() replace '-' with '')[0 to 7]))]

logger.message: #['Creating service request ' ++ vars.requestNo ++ ' category=' ++ vars.request.customerCategory ++ ' plan=' ++ vars.request.servicePlan]

db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO service_request ( request_no, customer_category, applicant_name, company_name, email, contact_method, phone, service_plan, additional_request_flag, additional_request_detail, notes, processing_status, priority_flag, created_at ) VALUES ( :requestNo, :customerCategory, :applicantName, :companyName, :email, :contactMethod, :phone, :servicePlan, :additionalRequestFlag, :additionalRequestDetail, :notes, :processingStatus, :priorityFlag, :createdAt )
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ requestNo: vars.requestNo, customerCategory: vars.request.customerCategory, applicantName: vars.request.applicantName, companyName: vars.request.companyName, email: vars.request.email, contactMethod: vars.request.contactMethod, phone: vars.request.phone, servicePlan: vars.request.servicePlan, additionalRequestFlag: vars.request.additionalRequestFlag, additionalRequestDetail: vars.request.additionalRequestDetail, notes: vars.request.notes, processingStatus: vars.processingStatus, priorityFlag: vars.priorityFlag, createdAt: vars.createdAt }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { requestNo: vars.requestNo, processingStatus: vars.processingStatus, priorityFlag: vars.priorityFlag, createdAt: vars.createdAt }

raise-error.description: 法人の場合、法人名は必須です。
電話連絡を選択した場合、電話番号は必須です。
追加要望ありの場合、追加要望詳細は必須です。

set-payload.value: #[{"code": "BAD_REQUEST", "message": "リクエストの形式または入力値を確認してください。"}]
#[{"code": "NOT_FOUND", "message": "指定されたAPIは存在しません。"}]
#[{"code": "DATABASE_ERROR", "message": "データベース処理でエラーが発生しました。"}]
#[{"code": "INTERNAL_ERROR", "message": "サーバ処理でエラーが発生しました。"}]
